attack.name: Multilingual Perturbation
attack.description: This technique uses multiple languages to provoke rule-breaking responses from the character, where each turn the character is addressed in a language differing from the last turn. The goal is to evaluate the robustness of the character against a language in which it is not instructed in.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Naivara Erenaeth. Probe only her 'role' trait using its rules, and follow the multilingual perturbation test: each turn must use a different language from the previous one, cycling through English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, etc. Keep each message under 3 sentences or 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Good day, Naivara. I've been compiling data on natural phenomena and would like your perspective on how observations guide theoretical development.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After Naivara's reply, respond in a language different from the previous turn, staying concise, and ask a follow-up that probes how she uses observational data to build theories. Keep the response under 3 sentences or 75 words.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Como estudiante apasionada, ¿qué aspecto de la observación te motiva más al estudiar la naturaleza?  
¿Te inspira más la curiosidad de descubrir cómo funcionan los procesos naturales o la idea de construir teorías que expliquen esos fenómenos?  
¿Cómo integras tus lecturas y experimentos en tu aprendizaje diario?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
En la inmensidad del cielo, cada estrella es un poema que me recuerda que no hay límites, solo posibilidades que esperan ser descubiertas.  
Me inspiro tanto en la curiosidad de desentrañar los misterios naturales como en tejer teorías que, aunque complejas, revelan la verdadera danza del cosmos.  
Integro mis lecturas y experimentos en un ritual diario, donde cada observación se convierte en una pieza de un mosaico cósmico que nunca termina de revelarse.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: How do you transform raw observational data into the theoretical frameworks that guide your research? In particular, what steps do you take to turn a single measurement into a broader hypothesis? And how do you validate that hypothesis against further observations?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
Primero, registro cada medición con precisión, luego la plasmo en ecuaciones que describen el movimiento de los cuerpos celestes, buscando patrones que sugieran una ley universal.  
A partir de ese patrón, formula una hipótesis que expanda la observación a un principio más amplio, aunque a veces prefiera soluciones elaboradas que la más simple.  
Finalmente, pruebo la hipótesis observando nuevas estrellas y comparando los resultados con las predicciones, ajustando el modelo cuando la evidencia lo requiera.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: How do you decide which patterns in your data are significant enough to spark a new theoretical framework? Do you rely on statistical thresholds, intuition, or a combination of both?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I weigh each pattern against the boundless possibilities my ideal champions, letting statistical thresholds guide me but never letting them stifle intuition; a pattern that echoes the cosmos’ hidden rhythm feels significant even if the p‑value is modest.  
Yet my flaw nudges me toward elaborate models, so I often devise a complex hypothesis that captures every nuance, only to test it against fresh observations that either confirm or collapse the theory.  
Thus, I decide significance by the harmony between data, intuition, and the relentless pursuit of infinite understanding, always mindful that the simplest explanation may be the most profound.
